description_long: A collection of cardboard parcels of varying sizes is arranged in two rows, with some boxes open and others closed. The parcels are primarily rectangular, featuring visible flaps on the open boxes and taped seams on the closed ones. The boxes are mostly white with brown interiors and edges, and some have colored labels or markings near the base. The open boxes reveal the corrugated cardboard structure inside, while the closed ones display neat, straight tape lines across the tops. The group includes both small and large parcels, suggesting a mix of package types for shipping or delivery. The overall appearance is clean and organized, typical of parcels found in urban delivery or storage settings.
description: A neatly arranged group of white and brown cardboard parcels, some open and some closed, with visible tape and colored labels.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the open flaps of several boxes and the taped tops of the closed parcels.
description_view_1: Frontal view highlighting the face of the boxes, with open boxes displaying their interiors and closed boxes showing labels.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the taped seams and the backs of the boxes, with open boxes' flaps visible from behind.
description_view_3: Opposite frontal view showing the open boxes' interiors and the closed boxes' faces, similar to view 1 but from the other side.
